notes: Default MySQL 8.0 package for supported non-Rocky9 targets.
Rocky9 uses the glibc2.28 non-minimal MySQL package.
MySQL Shell and Router are needed by InnoDB Cluster and Router flows.
Rocky9 uses the glibc2.28 server package; Shell and Router remain glibc2.17 by default for 8.4.
MySQL 9.7 uses glibc2.28 packages and is blocked on CentOS7, RedHat7, and BigCloud7.
Official tarball URL is listed; no checksum is published in this matrix.
Debug package clickhouse-common-static-dbg-23.6.1.1524-amd64.tgz is optional when clickhouse_install_debug_package=true.
